title: Silly Mod
description: Adds silly features to the game without intruding on the normal experience.. too much. So silly!!!
body:
Adds a buncha silly stuff like bananas you slip on and the fourth dimension + time travel!

Youtube series documenting added features hosted on this channel (not really though) [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCm-VkUfctP_YBVsGQ7y6-nw](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCm-VkUfctP_YBVsGQ7y6-nw) and discord [https://discord.com/invite/2bSsg6Rw8U](https://discord.com/invite/2bSsg6Rw8U).

**ADDED**
- Bananas
- Banana peels
- Packed blue ice (Hyperspeed included!)
- Unique music discs (Such as hit song "Burn Them", featuring the screams of the french!)
- Trampolines
- A variety of paintings
- Bread blocks
- Freddy Fazbear??
- Yellow snow
- And so much more!!
